prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 95.5 kg; Height 169.9 cm; BMI 33.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 223mg/dL; 6 months ago 192mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 95.9kg; 9 months ago 92.9kg; 6 months ago 91.3kg; 3 months ago 96.2kg; current 95.5kg), Height (12 months ago 169.9cm; 9 months ago 169.9cm; 6 months ago 169.9cm; 3 months ago 169.9cm; current 169.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 60mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 89U/L; 9 months ago 87U/L; 6 months ago 81U/L; 3 months ago 81U/L; current 87U/L), AST (12 months ago 93U/L; 9 months ago 94U/L; 6 months ago 96U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 85mg/g; 9 months ago 106mg/g; 6 months ago 104mg/g; 3 months ago 101mg/g; current 82mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 138mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.6g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
